6 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 
9 #include <arcane/IMesh.h>
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/PolytopicMesh/IGeom.h"
11 
12 #include "Geometry3Dbis_axl.h"
13 
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 
17 class Geometry3DbisService
18  : public ArcaneGeometry3DbisObject
19 {
20 public:
21 
23  Geometry3DbisService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
24  : ArcaneGeometry3DbisObject(sbi) {}
25 
27  ~Geometry3DbisService() {}
28 
30  void init();
31 
33  void apply();
34 
35 private:
36  Arcane::Real3 _triMeasureNormal(const Arcane::Face& f, const Arcane::NodeEnumerator& ne) ;
37  Arcane::Real _orientation(const Arcane::Cell& c, const Arcane::Face& f, const Arcane::Real3& vector) ;
38  Arcane::Real3 _X2AtTriGaussPoints(const Arcane::Face& f, const Arcane::NodeEnumerator& ne) ;
39  Arcane::Real _diameter(const Arcane::ItemWithNodes* item) ;
40  Arcane::Real3 _meanCenter(const Arcane::ItemWithNodes* item) ;
41 };
42 
43 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
44 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
45 
46 void
47 Geometry3DbisService::
48 init()
49 {
50  m_cell_measure.fill(0.) ;
51 }
52 
53 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
54 
55 void
56 Geometry3DbisService::
57 apply()
58 {
59  const auto& nodeCenters(mesh() -> nodesCoordinates()) ;
60 
61  ENUMERATE_NODE(iNode, mesh() -> allNodes()) {
62  m_node_coord[iNode] = nodeCenters[iNode] ;
63  }
64 
65  // Mean centers should be first defined since they are used by _orientation
66  m_cell_meancenter.fill(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
67 
68  ENUMERATE_CELL(iCell, mesh() -> allCells()) {
69  const auto& cell(*iCell) ;
70  m_cell_meancenter[cell] = _meanCenter(&cell);
71  }
72 
73  m_face_meancenter.fill(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
74  m_face_normal.fill(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
75  m_face_normal_flux.fill(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
76  m_face_measure.fill(0.0) ;
77  m_face_barycenter.fill(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
78  m_face_diameter.fill(0.) ;
79 
80  const auto epsilon(std::numeric_limits<double>::epsilon()) ;
81 
82  ENUMERATE_FACE(iFace, mesh() -> allFaces()) {
83  const auto& face(*iFace) ;
84 
85  m_face_diameter[face] = _diameter(&face) ;
86 
87  m_face_meancenter[face]= _meanCenter(&face) ;
88 
89  const auto& upwindCell(face.isSubDomainBoundary() ? face.boundaryCell() : face.backCell()) ;
90  auto& faceNormalFlux(m_face_normal_flux[face]) ;
91  auto& faceBarycenter(m_face_barycenter[face]) ;
92  ENUMERATE_NODE(iNode, face.nodes()) {
93  const auto triMeasureNormal(_triMeasureNormal(face, iNode)) ;
94  faceNormalFlux += triMeasureNormal ;
95  const auto triMeasure(triMeasureNormal.abs());
96 
97  const auto& curNodeCenter(m_node_coord[iNode]) ;
98  const auto curNodeIndex(iNode.index()) ;
99  const auto& nextNode((curNodeIndex < face.nbNode() - 1) ? face.node(curNodeIndex + 1) : face.node(0)) ;
100  const auto& nextNodeCenter(nodeCenters[nextNode]) ;
101  const auto& triCenter((m_face_meancenter[face] + curNodeCenter + nextNodeCenter) / 3.) ;
102  faceBarycenter += triMeasure * triCenter ;
103  }
104  const auto sign((iFace -> isSubDomainBoundary() && (! iFace -> isSubDomainBoundaryOutside())) ? -1. : 1.) ;
105  const auto orientation(_orientation(upwindCell, face, faceNormalFlux)) ;
106  const auto factor(orientation*sign);
107  faceNormalFlux *= factor ;
108  m_face_measure[face] = faceNormalFlux.abs() ;
109 
110  if(m_face_measure[face] > epsilon) {
111  m_face_normal[face]= faceNormalFlux / m_face_measure[face] ;
112  faceBarycenter /= m_face_measure[face] ;
113  } else {
114  throw std::runtime_error("Zero face measure") ;
115  }
116  }
117 
118  m_cell_measure.fill(0.) ;
119  m_cell_barycenter.fill(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
120  m_cell_diameter.fill(0.) ;
121  ENUMERATE_CELL(iCell, mesh() -> allCells()) {
122  const auto& cell(*iCell) ;
123 
124  m_cell_diameter[cell] = _diameter(&cell) ;
125 
126  // See https://www.ma.imperial.ac.uk/~rn/centroid.pdf
127  auto& cellMeasure(m_cell_measure[cell]) ;
128  auto& cellBarycenter(m_cell_barycenter[cell]) ;
129  ENUMERATE_FACE(iFace, iCell -> faces()) {
130  const auto& face(*iFace) ;
131 
132  ENUMERATE_NODE(iNode, face.nodes()) {
133  auto triMeasureNormal(_triMeasureNormal(face, iNode)) ;
134  const auto orientation(_orientation(cell, face, triMeasureNormal)) ;
135  triMeasureNormal *= orientation ;
136 
137  const auto& nodeCoord(m_node_coord[iNode]) ;
138  cellMeasure += Arcane::math::dot(nodeCoord, triMeasureNormal) ;
139 
140  const auto triMeasure(triMeasureNormal.abs()) ;
141 
142  if(triMeasure > epsilon) {
143  const auto triNormal(triMeasureNormal / triMeasure);
144  auto res(_X2AtTriGaussPoints(face, iNode));
145  res.mul(triNormal);
146  res *= triMeasure;
147  cellBarycenter += res;
148  } else {
149  throw std::runtime_error("Zero triangle measure") ;
150  }
151  }
152  }
153  cellMeasure /= 3. ;
154 
155  if(cellMeasure > epsilon) {
156  cellBarycenter /= 2. * cellMeasure ;
157  } else {
158  throw std::runtime_error("Zero cell measure") ;
159  }
160  }
161 }
162 
163 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
164 Arcane::Real3 Geometry3DbisService::_triMeasureNormal(const Arcane::Face& f, const Arcane::NodeEnumerator& ne) {
165  const auto curNodeIndex(ne.index()) ;
166  const auto& curNode(*ne) ;
167  const auto& nextNode((curNodeIndex < f.nbNode() - 1) ? f.node(curNodeIndex + 1) : f.node(0)) ;
168 
169  const auto& nodeCenters(mesh() -> nodesCoordinates()) ;
170  const auto& meanFaceCenter(m_face_meancenter[f]) ;
171  const auto& curCenter(nodeCenters[curNode]) ;
172  const auto& nextCenter(nodeCenters[nextNode]) ;
173  auto triMeasureNormal(0.5 * (Arcane::math::cross(curCenter - meanFaceCenter,
174  nextCenter - meanFaceCenter))) ;
175 
176  return triMeasureNormal ;
177 }
178 
179 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
180 Arcane::Real Geometry3DbisService::_orientation(const Arcane::Cell& c, const Arcane::Face& f,
181  const Arcane::Real3& vector) {
182  const auto& cellCenter(m_cell_meancenter[c]) ;
183  const auto cellFaceCentersVector(m_face_meancenter[f] - cellCenter) ;
184  const auto cellFaceCentersNormalDotProd(Arcane::math::dot(vector, cellFaceCentersVector)) ;
185  const auto orientation(cellFaceCentersNormalDotProd >= 0. ? 1. : -1.) ;
186  return orientation ;
187 }
188 
189 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
190 Arcane::Real3 Geometry3DbisService::_X2AtTriGaussPoints(const Arcane::Face& f, const Arcane::NodeEnumerator& ne) {
191  const auto curNodeIndex(ne.index()) ;
192  const auto& curNode(*ne) ;
193  const auto& nextNode((curNodeIndex < f.nbNode() - 1) ? f.node(curNodeIndex+ 1) : f.node(0)) ;
194 
195  const auto& nodeCenters(mesh() -> nodesCoordinates()) ;
196 
197  const auto& s1(nodeCenters[curNode]) ;
198  const auto& s2(nodeCenters[nextNode]) ;
199  const auto& s3(m_face_meancenter[f]) ;
200  const Arcane::Real3 p1(0.5 * (s2 + s3)), p2(0.5 * (s1 + s2)), p3(0.5 * (s1 + s3)) ;
201  const auto factor(1 / 3.) ;
202  return factor * Arcane::Real3(p1.x * p1.x + p2.x * p2.x + p3.x * p3.x,
203  p1.y * p1.y + p2.y * p2.y + p3.y * p3.y,
204  p1.z * p1.z + p2.z * p2.z + p3.z * p3.z) ;
205 }
206 
207 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
208 Arcane::Real Geometry3DbisService::_diameter(const Arcane::ItemWithNodes* item) {
209  const auto nbNodes(item -> nbNode());
210  double diameter=0.;
211  for(auto i(0) ; i < nbNodes ; ++i) {
212  const auto& node1(m_node_coord[item -> node(i)]) ;
213 
214  for(auto j(i+1) ; j < nbNodes ; ++j) {
215  const auto& node2(m_node_coord[item -> node(j)]) ;
216 
217  const Arcane::Real3 vect12(node2 - node1) ;
218  const Arcane::Real dist12(vect12.abs()) ;
219 
220  diameter = Arcane::math::max(diameter, dist12) ;
221  }
222  }
223  return diameter ;
224 }
225 
226 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
227 Arcane::Real3 Geometry3DbisService::_meanCenter(const Arcane::ItemWithNodes* item) {
228  Arcane::Real3 meanFaceCenter(Arcane::Real3::zero()) ;
229  ENUMERATE_NODE(iNode, item->nodes()) {
230  meanFaceCenter += m_node_coord[iNode] ;
231  }
232  meanFaceCenter /= item->nbNode() ;
233  return meanFaceCenter;
234 }
235 
236 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
237 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
238 
239 using namespace Arcane;
240 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_GEOMETRY3DBIS(Geometry3Dbis,Geometry3DbisService);

Interface permettant de definir les services uniques d'une application.
